entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "Chaza ama-black hole kalula"

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "Ngisize ngiqonde i-photosynthesis"

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "Ngifundise ukuthi inzalo isebenza kanjani"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Umhlahlandlela osebenzayo wokusebenzisa i-Learn Anything ku-inspir ukuze kufundwe izisekelo, unemiyalo, imijikelezo yokufunda, nemikhuba ye-AI ephephile.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Umjikelezo wokufunda oqinile

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: uthisha we-AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Cela isinyathelo sokuqala esincane kunempendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho, hhayi umphumela kuphela.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Abafundi abaneluphi, abafundi, abazali, kanye nabazifundisayo abafuna indawo enobungane yokuqala.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Qeda ngokubhala umqondo futhi usuka enkumbulweni.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Izisekelo

entries.source: Get examples at your level.
entries.value: Thola izibonelo ezisezingeni lakho.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Esikhundleni sokunikeza impendulo ende, i-inspir ikusiza ukuba ukhethe isisekelo esilula, indlela ejulile, noma isibonelo esisebenzisekayo.

entries.source: Learn Anything
entries.value: Funda Noma Yini

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Funda Noma Yini Nothisha we-AI Wamahhala kuyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Unelukuluku nganoma yini ngempela? Buza, hlola, futhi ujule ngesivinini sakho. Umngane wakho wenza imibono ibe yisebenzayo, ikhumbuleke, futhi kube lula ukwakhela phezu kwayo. Zama: "Chaza ukuthi imakethe yamasheya isebenza kanjani ngempela."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Funda Noma Yini Nothisha we-AI Wamahhala: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question.
entries.value: Phuma nombuzo olandelayo owusizo.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Imiyalo ongayizama

entries.source: Start the live mode at Learn Anything. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Socratic Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Qala imodi ebukhoma ku-Learn Anything. Uma ufuna ifomethi yokufunda eseduze, zama i-Socratic Instruction. Ukuze ubone inkundla kabanzi, funda ukuthi umlingani wokufunda nge-AI kufanele enzele wonke umuntu ini.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tshela imodi ukuthi uzama ukufunda noma ukukhiqiza ini.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Lowo mehluko ubonakala ekugelezeni. Esikhundleni sempendulo eyodwa enkulu, amasession angcono adlula emjikelezweni: setha inhloso, zama okuthile, thola impendulo, lungisa indawo ebuthakathaka, bese ukhetha isenzo esilandelayo.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Lokho kugxila kubalulekile. I-chatbot evamile ingaphendula cishe noma yini, kodwa imodi yokufunda inikeza ingxoxo isimo. Ikusunduza ohlotsheni lokucabanga, ukuzijwayeza, impendulo, noma ukuhlola okusiza umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Lona umkhuba ofanayo ongemuva kokutadisha nge-AI ngaphandle kokuzikhohlisa: gcina umfundi esebenza. I-AI iwusizo kakhulu lapho ikunikeza impendulo ngokucabanga kwakho.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Le modi iwusizo ikakhulukazi kubafundi abafuna uku:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Zama isinyathelo ngamazwi akho.

entries.source: Understand the core idea.
entries.value: Qonda umqondo oyinhloko.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Learn Anything uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa esakwazi ukuzivumelanisa nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akukhona ukuzwakala uhlakaniphile. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Lokho le modi esiza ngakho

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Lapho ongaya khona ngokulandelayo

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ungaqala futhi ngenguqulo engahlelwanga yenkinga yakho yangempela. Umyalo wokuqala ongacocekile ulungile. Iseshini ingacacisa izinga, izethameli, umnqamulajuqu, nesitayela uma usuqalile.
